title: Anmutig
description: A Minecraft 1.21.3 Modpack focused on Visuals and Performance.
body:
# Anmutig

## About

This vanilla modpack delivers an optimized Minecraft experience with no compromises. Key features include:

- **Built-in Shaders**: Enjoy stunning lighting and shadow effects right out of the box.  
- **Built-in Texture Pack**: Preloaded high-quality textures enhance the visual appeal.  
- **Seamless Multiplayer**: Integrated E4MC support ensures hassle-free server connectivity.  
- **Performance Focus**: Carefully selected mods keep gameplay smooth on a wide range of systems.  

Dive into a beautifully enhanced world, whether playing solo or with friends.

![PBR Showcase on a birch tree.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d80befc2877a87e3aa562ca1ca4d84baa87abe4a_0.webp)
